name: SAIPRIYA K
summary:
Full Stack Developer with 4 years of experience building scalable full stack web applications using ASP.NET Core, React.js, and SQL Server, delivering end-to-end solutions across frontend, backend, and database layers.

Improved application performance by optimizing RESTful APIs, EF Core queries, and SQL Server indexing, achieving up to 20% faster response times and 40% faster data processing.

Developed secure and user-focused features using JWT authentication and role-based access control, ensuring reliable system behavior and controlled access across multi-role applications.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile environments to deliver production-ready solutions, reducing system issues by 35% and supporting consistent deployments using CI/CD pipelines on Azure.

highlights: Built end-to-end web application features using ASP.NET Core, React.js, SQL Server
Improved API performance by 20% using async programming and EF Core optimization
Developed responsive UI using React, HTML5, CSS3
Developed backend services with ASP.NET Core + EF Core
Built REST APIs and frontend integration
Created UI with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript

projects.title: InLumin Healthcare E-commerce Web Application
details: Built using ASP.NET Core, SQL Server, JavaScript
Implemented catalog + search using LINQ + EF Core

projects.title: TalentRover Recruitment Application
details: Improved backend services and fixed production issues
Built REST APIs with pagination + validation
